passives.name: Annul
passives.effects: Grants a {{tip|spell shield}} that blocks the next hostile ability (40 second cooldown, timer restarts upon taking damage from champions).

effects_structured.raw: Spell shield blocks next hostile ability. Cooldown 40s (resets on damage from champs).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Annul grants a single-instance spell shield that blocks the next hostile ability, then enters cooldown.
Timing note: The 40-second refresh timer restarts when the holder takes damage from enemy champions, delaying shield return during sustained poke.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
